metadata.philosophy: Virality is engineered, not accidental. Reverse-engineer the format, then optimize.

specimens.title: Nas Daily 1-Minute Video Formula
specimens.creator: @nasdaily

performance_signals.key_metric: Consistent viral reach through rigid 60-second format constraint

pillar_1_bold_claim.description: Bold claim in first 2 seconds — declarative statement compressing a massive concept into a single sentence
pillar_1_bold_claim.mechanism: Functions as pattern interrupt and curiosity gap simultaneously
examples: This man can kill you with one finger.
I just found the happiest country on Earth.

pillar_2_fast_cuts.description: Fast cuts every 3-5 seconds maintaining neurological engagement through constant visual novelty
pillar_2_fast_cuts.mechanism: Prevents habituation response; creates dopamine micro-loop with each visual shift

pillar_3_emotional_peak.mechanism: Close enough to end that viewers who reach it complete; far enough from start to reward attention investment

pillar_4_universal_themes.description: Universal themes in specific stories — hyper-specific locations and people anchored to universal human themes
pillar_4_universal_themes.mechanism: Specific details make universal tangible (Heath brothers' Concrete + Emotional)
examples: Video about a fisherman in Japan becomes a story about craftsmanship
Video about a village in India becomes a story about resilience

pillar_5_tag_cta.description: Tag someone CTA — closing beat prompts social sharing through tagging
pillar_5_tag_cta.mechanism: Leverages Berger's Public principle (visible sharing) and Practical Value (sharing as gift)
examples: Tag someone who needs to see this.
Share this with someone who would love this place.

social_currency.mechanism: Sharing signals worldliness, cultural awareness, and curiosity

triggers.mechanism: Content ties to current events, travel seasons, and universal daily experiences

emotion.mechanism: Awe and inspiration as primary high-arousal emotions driving sharing

public.mechanism: 1-minute format designed for public resharing; tag CTA makes sharing visible

practical_value.mechanism: Genuinely useful information wrapped in entertainment format

stories.mechanism: Complete narrative arc with character, conflict, and resolution in 60 seconds

second_by_second.second_0_1: Bold text overlay with core claim; Nas begins speaking the claim aloud
second_by_second.second_1_2: Visual establishes setting — country, person, situation. Grounds the curiosity gap
second_by_second.second_2_3: Verbal shifts to 'And here's why...' or 'Let me explain...' — commits viewer to narrative loop

kane_elements_hit: Subverts expectations (challenges what you think you know)

distribution_mechanics.algorithm_fit: Facebook and Instagram reward completion rate + share rate. 1-minute format optimized for both.
distribution_mechanics.cross_platform: 60-second constraint makes content natively portable across Facebook, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok
distribution_mechanics.comment_triggers: Bold opening claims engineered to generate both agreement and debate comments; both signal algorithm to amplify
distribution_mechanics.amplification_mechanism: High completion + high share = Explore/For You placement extension

auraforge_application: Bold Claim Opener: Compress provocative AI insight into a single sentence
1-Minute Constraint: Force every concept into 60 seconds to eliminate filler
Specific-to-Universal Bridge: Start with specific tool/technique, bridge to universal theme
Tag CTA Engineering: Close with specific tag prompt targeting a person in viewer's mind
replication_framework.music_labs_application: This AI song got more streams than [human artist]. Here's how it happened in 47 seconds.
example_hooks: AI is about to make 90% of content creators irrelevant.
This one prompt replaces a $5,000 consultant.
I just found the AI tool that changes everything about music production.

ab_testing_angles.version_b: Question hook ('What if I told you...')

specimens.what_the_virality_engineer_would_say: Nas didn't go viral by accident 1,000+ times. He found a format — 1 minute, bold claim, fast cuts, emotional peak, tag CTA — and optimized it relentlessly. The format IS the moat. Every variable is controlled. The constraint creates the consistency. This is what happens when you treat content creation like engineering, not art. Find the formula, test the variables, compound the results.

specimens.title: Duolingo TikTok Brand Account Strategy
specimens.creator: @duolingo

performance_signals.key_metric: Brand account achieving creator-level engagement and virality

pillar_1_mascot_pattern_interrupt.description: Giant green owl mascot in unexpected situations no brand mascot should inhabit
pillar_1_mascot_pattern_interrupt.mechanism: Cognitive incongruity between 'corporate language-learning app' and 'unhinged green owl' creates friction that demands attention
examples: Pop culture parodies with the owl as protagonist

pillar_2_trend_jacking.description: Hijacking viral trends with brand-relevant twist within 24-48 hours
pillar_2_trend_jacking.mechanism: Format arbitrage (riding proven viral formats) + brand remixing (making it unmistakably Duolingo)
pillar_2_trend_jacking.critical_factor: Speed-to-trend — must execute within the wave's peak window

pillar_3_humor_social_currency.description: Content is funny first, branded second — inverts traditional brand content hierarchy
pillar_3_humor_social_currency.mechanism: Social currency of sharing is 'look at this hilarious video' not 'look at this brand I like'
pillar_3_humor_social_currency.berger_alignment: Social Currency principle — people share what makes THEM look good

pillar_4_no_direct_marketing.description: Vast majority of TikToks contain zero product mention, demonstration, or pitch
pillar_4_no_direct_marketing.mechanism: Ambient brand awareness through pure entertainment; avoids triggering advertising defense mechanisms
pillar_4_no_direct_marketing.framework_alignment: McKee's Storynomics — brand is the character, not the pitch

pillar_5_comments_become_content.description: Social team mines comments for content ideas, creating a viewer-to-content feedback loop
pillar_5_comments_become_content.mechanism: Audience becomes co-creation engine; ensures content stays maximally relevant
pillar_5_comments_become_content.framework_alignment: VCM ideation process running in real-time

social_currency.mechanism: Sharing signals humor, cultural awareness, and internet savviness. Sharer is 'in on the joke'

triggers.mechanism: Duolingo notification already an environmental trigger; TikTok content reinforces by dramatizing the owl's 'threat'

emotion.mechanism: Primary: amusement (high-arousal positive). Secondary: surprise. Both top-tier sharing emotions

public.mechanism: TikTok inherently public — duets, stitches, shares make engagement visible. Content designed for participatory formats

practical_value.mechanism: Minimal practical value in TikTok content. App delivers practical value; TikTok delivers awareness

stories.mechanism: Each video is a micro-narrative; ongoing owl 'lore' creates serial storytelling

hook_engineering.hook_type: Visual incongruity — the first frame IS the hook

second_by_second.second_0_1: Owl appears in unexpected context (office chaos, street encounter, pop culture reference). Visual incongruity stops scroll
second_by_second.second_1_2: Situation escalates or unexpected behavior intensifies. Commits viewer to narrative
second_by_second.second_2_3: Text overlay or voiceover adds comedic context framing the visual. Viewer understands joke setup, must see punchline

kane_elements_hit: Subverts expectations (brand mascot doing unhinged things)
Creates curiosity ('What is this owl doing NOW?')
Relatable + Unique (relatable cultural reference + unique owl insertion)

distribution_mechanics.algorithm_fit: TikTok rewards completion rate + rewatch rate. 15-30 second content maximizes both.
distribution_mechanics.comment_volume: 10,000-50,000+ comments per video; algorithm treats comment volume as high-value engagement signal
distribution_mechanics.cross_platform_spread: Content frequently screenshotted and shared on Twitter/X, Instagram, Reddit — organic cross-platform distribution without Duolingo's effort
distribution_mechanics.amplification_mechanism: High completion + rewatch + comments = For You Page distribution engine

auraforge_application: Create a Chaotic Brand Character: Amplify Marcus's provocative AI-strategist trait to absurdity
Trend-Jack with AI Twist: Insert AI perspective into trending sounds/memes within 24 hours
Never Pitch in Viral Content: Zero product mentions in viral TikToks/Reels. Move selling to separate channels
Mine Comments for Content: Every comment with 50+ likes is a content idea for the next week
replication_framework.music_labs_application: AI 'producer' character who is hilariously overconfident. POV: the AI wrote your beat and now thinks it's a Grammy-winning artist.
example_hooks: POV: You automated your entire business and have nothing to do at 2PM
POV: The AI you built is now better at your job than you are
When the AI music tool thinks it deserves a Grammy nomination

specimens.what_the_virality_engineer_would_say: Duolingo cracked the code: a brand account can outperform individual creators if it behaves like one. The owl is not a mascot — it's a character with a personality that happens to remind you Duolingo exists. They broke every rule of corporate social media and the rule-breaking IS the format. Trend-jack fast, never sell, let humor be the hook. The data backs it: 10M followers and consistent 10M+ views. That's not luck — that's a system.

specimens.title: Brendan Kane Client Viral Hooks Testing
specimens.creator: @brendankane

performance_signals.followers: N/A (client results, not personal account metrics)
performance_signals.views: Billions of views generated for clients
performance_signals.key_metric: Systematic hook testing methodology producing viral content at scale across diverse niches

pillar_1_hook_variation_testing.description: 10-20 hook variations tested per single content concept
pillar_1_hook_variation_testing.mechanism: Each variation is a hypothesis about attention capture. Concept stays identical; only first 3 seconds change. Isolates hook variable.

pillar_2_three_second_metric.description: 3-second retention as the single primary metric
pillar_2_three_second_metric.mechanism: Hook either captures or doesn't. Everything downstream is irrelevant if hook fails.
pillar_2_three_second_metric.kane_alignment: Core thesis — 3 seconds or less to capture, and if lost there, nothing else matters

pillar_3_winner_distribution.description: Winners get distribution push — organic boosting or paid amplification
pillar_3_winner_distribution.mechanism: Test organically, identify winners, push winners harder. VCM optimization cycle.
pillar_3_winner_distribution.process: Variant with highest 3-second retention receives investment

pillar_4_loser_data.description: Losers provide iteration data — every failed hook generates learning
pillar_4_loser_data.mechanism: GSB analysis between winning and losing hooks reveals invisible performance drivers

pillar_5_tested_into_existence.description: Content 'tested into existence' — final viral piece is version 7, 12, or 18, not first draft
pillar_5_tested_into_existence.mechanism: Iterative testing refines content until viral physics lock in. Antithesis of post-and-pray approach.

social_currency.mechanism: Depends on client's content topic — system optimizes whatever STEPPS principles exist in underlying content

triggers.mechanism: Testing identifies which trigger-rich hooks outperform without assuming which triggers to optimize for

emotion.mechanism: Hook testing naturally selects for high-emotion hooks — high-arousal emotion drives higher 3-second retention

public.mechanism: Testing creates publicly visible engagement signals (view counts, comment volume)

practical_value.mechanism: Methodology delivers practical value to practitioners; tested content's practical value varies

stories.mechanism: Hooks are pre-narrative — set up stories but story lives in body content

dominant_principles: STEPPS-agnostic — tests and lets data reveal which principles drive results

hook_engineering.hook_pattern: Systematic Multi-Variant Testing (all patterns tested simultaneously)
hook_engineering.hook_type: Framework for testing all hook types

variant_1.example: The one thing every successful person does that nobody talks about...

variant_2.example: I lost $500,000 following this common advice...

variant_3.example: Everyone is wrong about morning routines. Here's the proof.

variant_4.example: I went from 0 to 1M followers in 30 days. Here's exactly what happened.

variant_5.example: After building 60 billion views for clients, here's the one thing that actually matters...

variant_6.example: What if everything you've been told about content creation is wrong?

variant_7.example: 98% of content gets zero shares. Here's why yours is in that 98%.

second_by_second.second_0_1: Pattern varies by variant type — visual and/or verbal hook deployed
second_by_second.second_1_2: Stakes or specificity introduced to deepen commitment
second_by_second.second_2_3: Transition to body content — viewers who survive 3 seconds are committed

kane_elements_hit: All 10 elements systematically tested across variants
Winners reveal which elements matter for specific audience
hook_engineering.hook_point_score: System designed to produce 9-10/10 hooks through iteration

distribution_mechanics.algorithm_fit: High-volume variant publishing trains platform algorithms on creator's content profile for increasingly precise targeting
distribution_mechanics.winner_amplification: Clear winners (significantly higher 3-second retention) receive organic platform amplification because high retention signals quality
distribution_mechanics.data_compounding: Every testing round adds to growing dataset of what works for specific creator + audience + platform combination. Becomes competitive moat over time.
distribution_mechanics.amplification_mechanism: Testing itself creates conditions for algorithmic amplification through signal density

auraforge_application: Implement 10-Hook Protocol: Create 10 hook variations for every major content concept before publishing
Build Hook Performance Database: Track every hook tested with type, retention rate, and downstream performance
GSB Analysis on Existing Content: Categorize existing library into Gold/Silver/Bronze and compare hooks between tiers
Weekly Hook Iteration Cycle: Every Monday review last week's performance, identify winning pattern, create next week's content using variations of winner
replication_framework.music_labs_application: Test 10 hook variations per song release: 'This AI song got more streams than [artist]' vs. 'I made this hit in 47 seconds' vs. 'Spotify's algorithm loves this AI beat.'
example_hooks: After making $2M from AI products, here's what actually works.
98% of creators will be replaced by AI. Here's how to be the 2%.
I automated a $50K/month business in one weekend. Watch.

ab_testing_angles.metric: Isolate visual vs. verbal hook power

specimens.what_the_virality_engineer_would_say: This is the system behind the system. Kane doesn't create viral content — he creates a PROCESS that produces viral content. The difference between guessing and knowing is 10-20 hook tests. Every creator who publishes one version of their hook is leaving billions of views on the table. Test 15 hooks, find the winner, push the winner, learn from the losers, and do it again. This is what engineering looks like. Your intuition about what hook works is wrong more often than it's right. The data isn't.

specimens.title: Morning Brew Newsletter Referral Engine
specimens.creator: @morningbrew

performance_signals.key_metric: 4M+ subscribers acquired primarily through engineered word-of-mouth referral mechanics
performance_signals.acquisition: Acquired by Insider Inc. for reported $75M

pillar_1_referral_tiers.description: Gamified referral program with escalating rewards at each tier
pillar_1_referral_tiers.mechanism: Game mechanics function as Social Currency driver — each tier is a status milestone

pillar_2_forward_worthy_content.description: Newsletter engineered for shareability with at least one 'did you know' insight, one counter-intuitive take, and one useful piece per edition
pillar_2_forward_worthy_content.mechanism: Forward IS the value proposition — the forwardee sees genuinely valuable content, not just a referral link
pillar_2_forward_worthy_content.baer_alignment: Talkable Usefulness — content solves staying-informed problem so effectively that sharing is a genuine gift

pillar_3_social_currency.description: Sharing Morning Brew signals business-savvy, information-forward professional identity
pillar_3_social_currency.mechanism: Not 'I'm sharing a newsletter' but 'I'm sharing intelligence.' Social Currency embedded in content quality.
pillar_3_social_currency.identity_signal: I'm someone who curates smart content for my network

pillar_4_engineered_headlines.description: Subject lines and section headers are Hook Points designed for forwarding, not just opening
pillar_4_engineered_headlines.mechanism: Headline IS the word-of-mouth payload — subscriber types the headline as the forwarding message
pillar_4_engineered_headlines.gladwell_alignment: Stickiness Factor — message memorable enough to survive person-to-person transmission

pillar_5_ubiquitous_share_prompts.description: Share prompts at bottom of newsletter, end of key sections, and in referral dashboard
pillar_5_ubiquitous_share_prompts.mechanism: Repetition normalizes sharing behavior; benefit framing keeps Social Currency intact
pillar_5_ubiquitous_share_prompts.framing: Helping a friend (benefit) not getting stickers (reward)

social_currency.mechanism: Referral tiers create status levels. Sharing signals intelligence and curation ability. Insider knowledge feeling.

triggers.mechanism: Daily newsletter = daily trigger. Every weekday morning, inbox notification = Morning Brew = business intelligence ritual.

emotion.mechanism: Occasional high-arousal content (breaking news, surprising statistics). Primary engagement is intellectual.

public.mechanism: Referral leaderboards make sharing visible. High-tier merch creates public behavioral residue.

practical_value.mechanism: Core value proposition is practical — actionable business intelligence delivered efficiently.

stories.mechanism: Individual items use narrative framing. Newsletter as whole is information-forward.

hook_engineering.hook_pattern: Curiosity Gap + Social Currency (applied to email subject lines)
hook_engineering.hook_type: Subject line as email equivalent of 3-second video hook

second_by_second.subject_line: Curiosity gap that business professionals cannot ignore: 'The $100B mistake nobody saw coming.'
second_by_second.opening_line: First sentence confirms subject line promise and adds specificity. Converts opener into completer.
second_by_second.section_headers: Mini-headlines creating micro-curiosity gaps ensuring full newsletter read-through

kane_elements_hit: Minimal words (subject line constraint enforces brevity)
Creates curiosity (must open to resolve the gap)

distribution_mechanics.algorithm_fit: N/A — email distribution bypasses social algorithms entirely. Distribution is human-powered through referral mechanics.
distribution_mechanics.referral_loop: Each subscriber has unique referral link. Each referral adds subscriber who also gets referral link. Classic Gladwell epidemic model.
distribution_mechanics.habit_formation: Eyal's Hook Model — Trigger (inbox notification), Action (opening), Variable Reward (different content daily), Investment (referral progress toward next tier).
distribution_mechanics.social_amplification: Newsletter content repurposed into clip format for Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Instagram as top-of-funnel awareness drivers.
distribution_mechanics.amplification_mechanism: Human-powered viral loop with gamified incentives creating compounding subscriber growth

auraforge_application: Implement Tiered Referral Mechanics: Refer 3 -> exclusive AI prompt pack, Refer 10 -> private community access, Refer 25 -> 1-on-1 strategy call
Engineer Forward-Worthy Content: Every edition needs one 'did you know' AI insight, one counter-intuitive take, one actionable framework
Subject Line Hook Testing: A/B test every subject line using Kane's methodology — 3-5 variants to small segments, winner to full list
Daily Trigger Creation: Consistent delivery schedule creates Berger's Trigger mechanism
replication_framework.music_labs_application: Weekly 'AI Music Intelligence Briefing' newsletter with referral tiers: Refer 3 -> exclusive AI-generated sample pack, Refer 10 -> behind-the-scenes production breakdown.
example_hooks: The AI tool that replaced a $200K marketing team (and you can use it free).
3 frameworks that made me $1M this year. Here's all 3.
Every creator needs to read this before the AI wave hits.

ab_testing_angles.version_b: Direct value ('3 AI tools that replaced my team')

specimens.what_the_virality_engineer_would_say: Morning Brew proves virality works outside social media algorithms. They engineered word-of-mouth in EMAIL — the oldest digital channel — by treating every newsletter like a Hook Point and every subscriber like a potential distribution node. The referral tiers are game mechanics. The content is designed to be forwarded, not just read. The subject lines are Hook Points for the inbox. 4 million subscribers and a $75M acquisition — all built on engineered shareability. This is what happens when you apply viral engineering to any channel.

specimens.title: Ryan Trahan Quest Series (Penny Challenge)
specimens.creator: @ryantrahan

performance_signals.views: 1B+ total views across Penny Challenge series
performance_signals.key_metric: Viral compounding across 30 episodes — each episode amplifying the next

pillar_1_episodic_commitment.description: 30-episode narrative arc hooks viewers into series-level commitment
pillar_1_episodic_commitment.mechanism: After 3 episodes watched, abandoning feels like quitting mid-chapter. Eyal's Investment phase at series level.
pillar_1_episodic_commitment.youtube_alignment: Algorithm recognizes binge-watching pattern and recommends subsequent episodes automatically

pillar_2_cliffhanger_endings.description: Every episode ends at unresolved tension — trade about to happen, challenge mid-completion, situation about to go wrong
pillar_2_cliffhanger_endings.mechanism: McKee's Violation of Expectation applied to series structure. Each climax is a new inciting incident for next episode.
pillar_2_cliffhanger_endings.berger_alignment: Curiosity gap at series level — loop only closable by watching next episode

pillar_3_underdog_narrative.description: Starting with one penny is the ultimate underdog setup
pillar_3_underdog_narrative.mechanism: Heath brothers' Challenge Plot — obstacles overcome, David vs. Goliath. Inspires high-arousal emotional states (courage, inspiration) that drive sharing.
pillar_3_underdog_narrative.sharing_motivation: I'm rooting for this guy, and I want you to root for him too

pillar_4_practical_entertainment.description: Genuine bartering, side hustle, and negotiation demonstrations embedded in entertainment
pillar_4_practical_entertainment.mechanism: Berger's Stories principle Trojan Horse — information travels under guise of entertainment
pillar_4_practical_entertainment.dual_sharing: Parent shares as educational resource; friend shares as entertainment. Both valid, both drive distribution.

pillar_5_cross_platform_teasers.description: 15-60 second teaser clips from each episode for TikTok, Reels, Shorts
pillar_5_cross_platform_teasers.mechanism: Short-form as funnel to long-form. Teasers are Hook Points creating curiosity gaps resolvable only by watching full episode.
pillar_5_cross_platform_teasers.strategy: Teasers are not recaps — they are engineered hooks for the full episode

social_currency.mechanism: Watching and recommending signals cultural awareness. Being 'caught up' creates insider status among peer groups.

triggers.mechanism: Daily episode release = daily trigger. 'Penny' concept becomes physical trigger — seeing a penny IRL triggers series association.

emotion.mechanism: Awe (can he do this?), anxiety (will he make it?), excitement (he's pulling it off), inspiration (if he can with a penny...). All high-arousal.

public.mechanism: Fan edits, reaction videos, real-life penny challenge recreations. Fandom IS the distribution.

practical_value.mechanism: Real demonstrations of bartering, negotiation, side hustles. Viewers learn while entertained.

stories.mechanism: Entire series IS a story — protagonist, escalating conflict, stakes, resolution. Purest STEPPS Stories application.

hook_engineering.hook_pattern: Transformation Reveal + Curiosity Gap (series) / Cliffhanger Resume (episodes)
hook_engineering.hook_type: Dual-level: series hook for new viewers + episode hook for returning viewers

series_level_hook.second_0_1: 'I'm starting with one penny.' Visual: holds up single penny. Absurdity of premise = pattern interrupt.
series_level_hook.second_1_2: 'And I'm going to survive for 30 days.' Scope of challenge creates curiosity gap.
series_level_hook.second_2_3: 'Let's go.' Immediate action — no lengthy setup signals fast-paced entertainment.

episode_level_hook.second_0_1: Recap of previous cliffhanger — immediately re-activates unresolved tension
episode_level_hook.second_1_2: New inciting incident raising stakes beyond previous episode
episode_level_hook.second_2_3: Commitment to action — 'Today, everything changes' or 'This is where it gets crazy'

kane_elements_hit: Subverts expectations (surviving on a penny is absurd)
Relatable + Unique (everyone knows a penny; nobody has tried surviving on one)
Episode hooks leverage sunk investment from returning viewers

distribution_mechanics.algorithm_fit: YouTube rewards session time. Episodic series with 2-5 consecutive episodes creates massive session time signals.
distribution_mechanics.subscriber_conversion: Viewers watching 3+ episodes highly likely to subscribe to avoid missing next episode. Subscription = Eyal Investment phase.
distribution_mechanics.cross_platform_funnel: TikTok/Reels teasers (15-60 sec) -> YouTube full episodes (15-25 min) -> YouTube series binge (5-15 hours total)
distribution_mechanics.fan_content_multiplier: Thousands of fan recreations, reaction videos, commentary videos — each exposing new audiences to original series
distribution_mechanics.amplification_mechanism: Compounding distribution — each episode's performance amplifies next episode's algorithmic recommendation

auraforge_application: Quest Series Format: 'Starting with $0 and building a business using only AI in 30 days' — same underdog premise with AI domain
Cliffhanger Architecture: End every episode mid-action with unresolved tension driving next-episode clicks
Short-Form Teaser System: 3 TikTok/Reels teasers per YouTube episode (peak moment, cliffhanger, surprising insight)
Practical Value Embedding: Every entertainment episode contains at least one teachable AI workflow or business strategy
replication_framework.music_labs_application: 'Can AI Write a Hit Song? 30-Day Challenge.' Start with AI-generated melody, engineer into real release with real streaming numbers. Quest format + music + AI = unique positioning.
example_hooks: Day 1: I have $0 and one AI tool. In 30 days, I'm building a business.
The AI built something I never expected. This changes everything.
I started with a prompt. Now I have paying customers. Here's Day 15.

specimens.what_the_virality_engineer_would_say: Trahan engineered a SYSTEM, not a video. 30 episodes where each one is a distribution engine for the next. The penny premise is the ultimate Hook Point — absurd enough to stop you, simple enough to explain in one sentence, and universal enough that everyone can root for it. The cliffhangers are engineered commitment loops. The teasers are cross-platform funnels. The underdog narrative is a sharing trigger. 1 billion views is not luck — it's what happens when every element of a series is optimized for compound viral distribution.

pattern_1_three_second_gate.description: Every specimen lives or dies in the first 3 seconds regardless of platform, format, or content type

pattern_2_engineered_shareability.description: No specimen relies on content 'being good enough to share' — each engineers a specific sharing mechanism

pattern_3_platform_physics_alignment.description: Each specimen optimized for its platform's specific algorithmic reward system

pattern_4_data_over_intuition.description: Every specimen demonstrates data-driven optimization over creative instinct

pattern_5_compound_distribution.description: Each specimen demonstrates compounding mechanics where success amplifies further success
